home.title: Home
home.content_empty_message: The content for this section is not ready to display right now. You can check again later.

language.title: Language preference
language.description: You can instantly switch the app language between Turkish and English.

count.unread_messages: {count} unread messages are waiting for you.

info.password_requirements_short: Your password must be at least 8 characters and include upper/lower case letters plus numbers.
info.password_requirements_long: Your password must include at least 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 number, and be at least 8 characters long.

validation.accept_terms: You need to accept the terms to continue.
validation.select_identity_image: You need to select an institution ID image to continue.

login_required.title: Log in to create entries, interact, and send messages.
login_required.description: You need to log in to use interaction and messaging features in the app.

login.header_description: Sign in with your username and password. Your flow is waiting.
login.banner_message: Continue with a single session for titles, groups, and chats.
login.secondary_cta: Register if you do not have an account
login.hero_title: Pick up right where you left off.
login.hero_description: Follow your topics, discover new content, and stay in sync with the community.
login.feature_clean_description: Content, group, and chat experiences continue from one place.
login.feature_community_description: Agenda, chats, and interactions are shaped for you after sign in.
login.feature_secure_description: Your account and personal flow stay protected with the current session logic.

register.header_description: Complete your information, verify your profile, and start with the Hipocapp community in a modern way.
register.banner_message: We build a healthier community experience with institution ID, degree selection, and core account details.
register.identity_description: Verify your registration by adding your institution ID or card image.
register.hero_title: Create your profile, join the community.
register.hero_description: Open topics, join chats, and begin a safer experience with your verified profile.
register.feature_verified_description: The institution ID upload step helps you create a safer profile in the community.
register.feature_community_description: Once registration is complete, you move directly into titles, groups, and message flow.
register.feature_profile_description: Your degree and account info help shape a more meaningful experience tailored to you.

forgot_password.header_description: Enter your registered email address and we will send password reset guidance.

profile.quick_settings_description: Switch theme mode or securely sign out of your account.
profile.info_empty_message: Check your connection and try again to load account details.
profile.account_description: Review your visible information and contact details from one place.
profile.community_description: Track key summary details about your profile at a glance.
profile.edit_description: Keep your account more trustworthy and up to date by refreshing visible details.
profile.photo_banner_message: When you add a new photo, your profile card and chat areas become easier to recognize.
profile.photo_description: Strengthen your account visibility by choosing a current photo.
profile.change_password_description: Verify your current password and set a new one to protect your account.
profile.security_tip_message: Set your new password with a unique, hard-to-guess combination you have not used before.
profile.delete_entry_message: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
profile.entries_empty_message: Your shared entries will appear here. This area will come alive once you create your first piece of content.
profile.follow_action_failed: The follow action could not be completed right now.

introduction.page_discover_body: Discover titles based on your interests and read other users' experiences and comments.
introduction.page_share_body: Write your thoughts freely, contribute to other people's ideas, or start a new title.
introduction.page_connect_body:
Meet people with shared interests, chat, and become part of the community.

You need to create an account to use these features.

chat_user_list.title: Messages
chat_user_list.search_description: Filter the people you follow and jump into a direct conversation faster.

header.users_description: Choose the right person and jump into a new conversation instantly.
header.past_messages_description: Track your recent conversations from one screen and catch unread messages faster.
header.groups_description: Join the community rooms you belong to and keep shared conversations going without interruption.

empty.users_title: You are not following anyone yet
empty.search_message: Try a simpler search to find the followed user you want to message.
empty.users_message: People you follow will appear here for direct messaging.
empty.conversations_message: Your recent conversations will appear here. You can switch to the following tab to start a new chat.
empty.groups_message: Channels you joined will be listed here.

user.active: Active right now and ready to chat

group.member_count: Join the channel chat with {count} members
group.open_direct: Open the community channel and join the conversation directly

chat.empty_group_title: No messages in this group yet
chat.empty_group_message: You can start the conversation by sending the first message.
chat.empty_direct_message: You can start with a quick hello.
chat.composer_hint_group: Write what you want to share with the group

group_list.title: Channel List
group_list.join_requires_login: You need to log in before joining a channel.
group_list.join_failed: Your join request could not be processed right now.
group_list.header_title: Find your community and join the flow
group_list.header_description_logged_in: Discover the channels that interest you, send a join request, and quickly become part of the community chat.
group_list.header_description_logged_out: Browse open channels. You only need to sign in to send a join request.
group_list.empty_message: New community channels will be listed here. You can check back again soon.
group_list.card_default_description: No description has been shared for this channel yet.
group_list.card_info_logged_in: You can send a join request to channels you find relevant with a single tap.
group_list.card_info_logged_out: You need to sign in before joining this channel.

entry_list.header_description_logged_in: Follow the latest entries under this title and add your own contribution whenever you want.
entry_list.header_description_logged_out: Browse the latest entries under this title. Signing in is enough when you want to contribute.
entry_list.composer_description: Share your contribution for this title in a clear and readable way.
entry_list.composer_hint: Write your opinion, experience, or note for this title...
entry_list.composer_tip: Short, respectful, and on-topic posts create a better flow.
entry_list.empty_message_logged_in: You can start the flow by sharing the first comment for this title.
entry_list.empty_message_logged_out: This title is still empty. Once you sign in, you can share the first comment.

drawer.header_description_logged_out: Explore, choose a category, and reach the titles that interest you from one place.
drawer.theme_description: You can instantly adapt the drawer experience to light or dark mode.
drawer.menu_description: Choose one of the areas that interest you. The selected subheading instantly matches the related flow.
drawer.contribution_description_logged_in: You can open a new title for this category and quickly contribute to the community.
drawer.contribution_description_logged_out: You need to sign in before opening a new title.
drawer.titles_description_selected: You can open the latest titles for {category} here.
drawer.titles_description_default: Relevant titles are listed here after you select a subcategory.
drawer.titles_item_hint: Open the detail flow and follow entries from a single screen.
drawer.empty_selected_message: There is no title for {category} yet. You can revive the flow by adding a new title.
drawer.empty_default_message: Once you choose a subcategory, matching titles will appear here automatically.
drawer.input_dialog_description: Start your thought with a clear title and an explanatory first entry.
drawer.input_dialog_title_hint: Example: What is the most efficient way to study anatomy notes?
drawer.input_dialog_entry_hint: Write a short but explanatory opening for the topic...

splash.hero_title: We are preparing the flow that connects you with your healthcare community.
splash.hero_description: While your theme choice, onboarding steps, and core app checks are completed in the background, we will direct you to the right screen.
splash.status_title: We are directing you to the right launch flow.
splash.status_description: Your saved preferences and welcome steps are being checked. When it is complete, you will move to the next screen automatically.
splash.step_theme_description: Your saved appearance choice is being applied across the app.
splash.step_flow_description: Whether onboarding is needed is determined quietly.
splash.step_experience_description: We are moving you to the next suitable page with a clean transition.
